comment: I got a two free versions of this shout from parthunax, but when I played one of them, the other one upgraded, which had two unexpected effects: The artwork was lost, and the cost went back to 3. I would have expected it to stay at zero cost. Did the artwork get lost because of the parthunax method of obtaining it?
